name: Multiple contractors on site in Saint George—how to figure out who's liable for my fall?

mainEntity.name: Multiple contractors on site in Saint George—how to figure out who's liable for my fall?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Investigate contracts, safety roles; general contractor, subs, owner often share duties—lawyer uses discovery.** Common in multi-party sites[2][3]. **Key factors:** 1. OSHA violations per party. 2. Control over area. 3. Indemnity agreements. 4. Joint/several liability. Don't guess—hire expert investigator early.
